name: Metal Energy Corp.
description: Metal Energy Corp. (TSXV: MERG, OTCQB: MEEEF) is a critical metals exploration company focused on copper and gold assets in Canada. The Company controls the NIV, a fully permitted, and drill-ready copper-gold-molybdenum project located in British Columbia’s prolific Toodoggone District. With the addition of NIV, Metal Energy’s portfolio includes three high-potential projects: the NIV Project in the Toodoggone District, the Highland Valley Project in British Columbia, and the Manibridge Project in Manitoba, all of which are strategically positioned for exploration and development within the Canadian mining sector.
